name: flipper-cli-script-gen-eng
description: Safe keyboard automation generator for authorized lab/demo use

scripts.prompt: node cli/index.js --prompt "open windows powershell and run get-date" --format ducky --os windows
scripts.quickstart: npm run validate && npm run list && npm run preview && npm run prompt && npm run project && npm run pack
scripts.release:verify: npm run validate && npm test && npm run quickstart
